summary: Iter12: License system end-to-end testing — backend round-trip (gallery+components, agpl-3.0/mit/default cc-by-4.0/legacy items), Landing banner + tooltip + body copy, ShareDialog + SaveComponentDialog license selectors (12 opts, default cc-by-4.0), gallery+component license badge chips on both tabs with canonical URL anchors. Full pytest regression (71/71) including test_voice_command::test_boolean_subtract (still green, not skipped).

test_results.backend_license_roundtrip_agpl_gallery: PASS — POST /api/gallery with license='agpl-3.0' returns license='agpl-3.0' and GET /api/gallery confirms persistence
test_results.backend_license_roundtrip_mit_components: PASS — POST /api/components with license='mit' returns license='mit' and GET /api/components confirms persistence
test_results.backend_license_default_cc_by_4_gallery: PASS — omitting license in POST /api/gallery returns license='cc-by-4.0'
test_results.backend_license_default_cc_by_4_componen: PASS — omitting license in POST /api/components returns license='cc-by-4.0'
test_results.backend_get_listings_have_license_field: PASS — every item in /api/gallery and /api/components has a non-empty license field (legacy items default to cc-by-4.0 via Pydantic default at response construction)
test_results.backend_full_regression: PASS — 71/71 backend pytest pass (including test_voice_command::test_boolean_subtract; not deselected)
test_results.frontend_landing_hero_tooltip: PASS — [data-testid='hero-slice-tooltip'] present; hover reveals [data-testid='hero-slice-tooltip-body'] containing 'outer-shell preview' text
test_results.frontend_landing_body_copy: PASS — body contains 'CAD for people who wish they could do CAD, but don't know how...'
test_results.frontend_share_license_field: PASS — [data-testid='share-license-field'] + [data-testid='share-license'] present; exactly 12 <option> children; default cc-by-4.0
test_results.frontend_share_agpl_roundtrip: PASS — select agpl-3.0 → submit → [data-testid='share-success'] shown → GET /api/gallery confirms new design has license='agpl-3.0'
test_results.frontend_component_mit_roundtrip: PASS — select mit → submit → GET /api/components confirms new component has license='mit'
test_results.frontend_gallery_designs_license_badges: PASS — 9 [data-testid^='gallery-license-'] badges render on Designs tab
test_results.frontend_gallery_components_license_badg: PASS — 15 [data-testid^='component-license-'] badges render on Components tab
test_results.frontend_license_badge_anchor_url: PASS — license badges with canonical URL render as <a> with href + target='_blank' (9 verified on Designs tab)
test_results.regression_4_dialogs_open: PASS — share-dialog, save-component-dialog, orca-dialog (via send-to-orcaslicer-btn), save-printer-dialog all open with their expected testids
test_results.regression_anon_auth: PASS — login-btn present, user-menu-trigger absent on anonymous

critical_code_review_comments: Pydantic default `license: str = 'cc-by-4.0'` is applied at both GalleryItemCreate (request) and GalleryItemMeta (response) — clean two-sided default; legacy MongoDB docs without the key still emit cc-by-4.0 on GET as intended.
Length cap `.strip()[:40]` on persisted license id is good defensive input handling (prevents arbitrary-length junk strings).
ShareDialog + SaveComponentDialog correctly share the LICENSES catalog from /lib/licenses.js; no duplicated literal arrays.

LicenseBadge in Gallery.jsx renders as <a target='_blank' rel='noreferrer'> when meta.url is non-empty and falls back to a non-anchor chip for 'standard-digital' (which has no canonical URL) — correct behaviour.

Hydration console warning observed: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>'. ShareDialog/SaveComponentDialog wrap each option's label text in a <span data-ve-dynamic>, which is invalid HTML inside <option>. Non-blocking (browsers tolerate it; dropdown still works correctly with 12 options and round-trips), but worth cleaning up — likely a dev-mode wrapper from the editor tooling, not user-authored code. Recommend ignoring unless prod build also emits it.
Iter11 nit (components list sort missing 'verified' first key) still present in server.py — unchanged this iteration, low priority.
test_credentials: Not needed for this iteration — all flows tested anonymously (gallery + components POST accept anonymous authors). Auth seeding (mongosh per /app/memory/test_credentials.md) was not exercised but the anon→login-btn / user-menu-trigger absence regression still passes.
seed_data_creation: Backend pytest creates TEST_iter12_* gallery+component docs (left in DB; small, non-disruptive). Frontend live tests created TEST_iter12_share_<ts> in gallery and TEST_iter12_comp_<ts> in components — visible on /gallery as expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 phases of the license/landing/contributor-tier iteration verified at backend AND frontend levels. New regression file /app/backend/tests/test_license_api.py (6 tests) covers license persistence + defaults + legacy fallback for both /api/gallery and /api/components. Reuse for future iterations. One dev-mode hydration warning noted in critical_code_review_comments but not breaking. No action items.
